last_cycle.summary: Q046: Built m4_pcds.py — AudioSAEBench M4 PCDS Tier 0 scaffold. Audio-RAVEL Cause/Isolate two-score. Mock shows Specialized PCDS=0.776, Polysemantic Cause=0.63/Isolate=0.04 (Gap #30 audio leakage confirmed), Noise PCDS=0.000.
